flow_points: Scotland started strong with 52 runs for 0 wickets in the Powerplay (RR 8.67).
Sompal Kami delivered a crucial spell of 3 wickets for 26 runs, applying defensive pressure on Scotland.
MA Jones anchored Scotland's innings with 71(46), contributing 41.8% of their runs.
Nepal responded with an aggressive Powerplay, scoring 56 runs for 0 wickets (RR 9.33).

DS Airee anchored Nepal's innings, contributing 29.2% of the team's runs.
A high-scoring finish by Nepal in the Death Overs (RR 13.62) shifted match momentum decisively.
